description_long: This is a stylized adult female figure standing in a relaxed pose, with one hand resting on her hip and the other raised near her face, forming a peace sign. She is dressed in a short-sleeved, fitted top and casual shorts, paired with open-toed sandals. Her hair is medium-length, straight, and slightly tousled, partially covering one side of her face. The figure's proportions and features are cartoon-like, with smooth surfaces and simplified anatomical details. The overall appearance suggests a casual, approachable character suitable for urban or park environments. The model's posture and gesture convey a friendly, informal attitude.
description: A stylized adult female figure in casual attire, standing with one hand on her hip and the other making a peace sign. She has medium-length straight hair and wears a fitted top, shorts, and sandals.
description_view_0: Front view showing the face, peace sign gesture, and relaxed stance with one hand on the hip.
description_view_1: Three-quarter rear view highlighting the side of the face, arm position, and the back of the hair.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the head, both arms, and the overall posture from behind.
description_view_3: Side view emphasizing the profile of the face, arm gesture, and the side of the body.
attribute_posture: standing with one hand on hip and the other making a peace sign
attribute_hairstyle: medium-length straight hair with side part
